title: jurinea consanguinea subsp. arachnoidea
intro: Jurinea consanguinea subsp. arachnoidea, also known as Jurinea arachnoidea, is a plant species in the genus Jurinea, which belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to Central Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The herbal preparations of Jurinea arachnoidea are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, and are typically prepared as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures.
